app.title: BrandVoice Studio
app.tagline: Authentic prompts for your handmade textile brand

settings.title: AI Settings
settings.description: Your data is only stored in your browser and sent directly to the chosen AI provider. We never store it on our servers.
settings.missing: Configure your AI provider to continue.
settings.format_hint_google: Must start with «AIza» followed by 35 characters.

fabricDetails.label: Fabric Details
fabricDetails.placeholder: E.g: Organic cotton muslin double layer, cream color with floral embroidery in camel tone
fabricDetails.hint: Describe textures, seams, colors and finishes (5–500 characters)

instagramVibe.label: Instagram Vibe / Occasion
instagramVibe.placeholder: E.g: Summer afternoon in the garden, intimate baby shower
instagramVibe.hint: The atmosphere or moment you want to convey (3–200 characters)

errors.api_key_missing: AI settings missing. Go to Settings.
errors.network: Could not connect to the server. Please check your connection.
errors.rate_limit: Too many requests. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.ai_service: The AI service could not generate the prompt. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
